name: Friskies Cat Junior Chicken 85g
shortDescription: FRISKIES Junior Chicken 85G provides wholesome nutrition for kittens and expectant or nursing cats. Each pouch features juicy chicken pieces in a savory gravy , offering complete and balanced nourishment that supports strong bones, muscle growth, and a healthy immune system , ensuring your young cat thrives from the start.
description: Nutritional Composition • Meat and animal derivatives (chicken 4%) • Moisture: 82.5% • Protein: 7.5% • Fat: 3.0% • Crude ash: 2.5% • Crude fibre: 0.1% • Enriched with vitamins A, D3, E and essential minerals (iron, copper, manganese, zinc) Key Benefits • Specially formulated for kittens under 1 year old. • Tender chicken chunks in rich gravy for taste and texture kittens love. • Complete and balanced to support healthy growth. • Packed with essential vitamins and minerals for strong immunity. • Easy to eat and digest for developing tummies. Feeding Guidelines • 6–12 weeks: 1.5–4.5 pouches/day • 12–26 weeks: 3–6 pouches/day • 26–52 weeks: 3–6 pouches/day (adjust as needed) Feed in 2–3 meals daily at room temperature and always provide fresh drinking water.
